title: Tenant migration queue
description: Phase 4 (Tier 6) — operational view of the per-tenant migration queue. Read against the control-plane Postgres (datasource: control-plane-pg).

targets.rawSql: SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', enqueued_at) AS time, status, count(*) AS value FROM tenant_migration_jobs WHERE enqueued_at > now() - interval '24 hours' GROUP BY time, status ORDER BY time, status

SELECT t.size_bucket, percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (j.finished_at - j.started_at))) AS p50_seconds, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (j.finished_at - j.started_at))) AS p95_seconds, count(*) AS n_done FROM tenant_migration_jobs j JOIN tenants t ON t.id = j.tenant_id WHERE j.status = 'done' AND j.finished_at > now() - interval '7 days' AND j.started_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t.size_bucket ORDER BY t.size_bucket

SELECT t.wave, sum(CASE WHEN j.status IN ('failed','timedout') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::float / NULLIF(count(*), 0) AS failure_rate, count(*) AS n_total FROM tenant_migration_jobs j JOIN tenants t ON t.id = j.tenant_id WHERE j.finished_at > now() - interval '7 days' GROUP BY t.wave ORDER BY t.wave
SELECT count(*) AS depth FROM tenant_migration_jobs WHERE status IN ('queued', 'blocked')
SELECT COALESCE(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - min(enqueued_at))) / 3600.0, 0) AS oldest_hours FROM tenant_migration_jobs WHERE status IN ('queued', 'blocked')
SELECT count(*) AS running FROM tenant_migration_jobs WHERE status = 'running'
